entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Arid regions facing water scarcity, land degradation, and poor productivity

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: Lack of sufficient water resources in dryland ecosystems

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality of land in dryland areas

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The level of output from agricultural and livestock sectors

entities.name: CHRONIC POVERTY
entities.description: Persistent state of poverty in dryland hotspots

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Lack of proper nutrition in dryland populations

entities.name: ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the economic well-being of a region

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector providing livelihoods to over 55% of the population in drylands

entities.name: CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Changing weather patterns that increase agricultural risks

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by living organisms such as pests and diseases

entities.name: PESTS AND DISEASES
entities.description: Biological agents that cause biotic stress to crops

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental stresses such as drought and floods

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall

entities.name: DRY SPELLS
entities.description: Short-term periods of dry weather

entities.name: FLOODS
entities.description: Overflow of water onto land causing crop damage

entities.name: HAILSTORM
entities.description: A storm that precipitates hail, causing crop damage

entities.name: CROP LOSS
entities.description: Partial or full loss of agricultural yield due to stresses

entities.name: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA
entities.description: The national government implementing social protection programs

entities.name: SOCIAL PROTECTION PROGRAMS
entities.description: Government initiatives designed to alleviate farmer distress

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Science-based interventions to build system-level resilience

entities.name: CROP INSURANCE PREMIA
entities.description: Payments for crop insurance that require rationalization

entities.name: SYSTEM-LEVEL RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of the agricultural system to withstand and recover from shocks
